name: ProcessCheckExtr_EE

text.value: select SUBJ_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD from @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC where CYC_STTUS_CD = 'RUNNING' and SUBJ_CD = '@{pipeline().parameters.Subject}' and TRGT_SYS_CD = '@{pipeline().parameters.TargetSys}' UNION select SUBJ_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD from @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC where CYC_STTUS_CD = 'RUNNING' and SUBJ_CD = '@{pipeline().parameters.Subject}' and SRC_SYS_CD <> '@{pipeline().parameters.SourceSys}' and TRGT_SYS_CD = '@{pipeline().parameters.TargetSys}' UNION select SUBJ_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD from @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC where CYC_STTUS_CD = 'RUNNING' and SUBJ_CD = '@{pipeline().parameters.Subject}' and SRC_SYS_CD = '@{pipeline().parameters.SourceSys}'
